description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in phpDynaSite 3.2.2 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the racine parameter to (1) function_log.php, (2) function_balise_url.php, or (3) connection.php.
